onboarding.title: What is your restaurant called?
onboarding.description: We’ll use the name to create your account and the first address for your restaurant.
onboarding.helper: We’ll add the menu and the rest of the setup a bit later.
onboarding.error: We couldn’t create your restaurant. Please try again.
onboarding.slugError: We couldn’t reserve a unique address. Please try again.

welcome.title: Welcome to HaresvaMi.
welcome.subtitle: A few steps before the first piece of feedback comes in.

menu.descTodo: So the AI can match dishes from printed receipts.
menu.descDone: {count, plural, one {# dish} other {# dishes}} · AI is learning your abbreviations.

tablet.descTodo: The tablet will scan your customers’ receipts at the table.

feedback.title: First feedback
feedback.descLocked: We’ll tick this automatically the moment the first rating arrives.
feedback.descWaiting: Everything is ready. The moment a customer rates a dish, you’ll see it here.

tier.title: Free plan
tier.blurb: The trial unlocks AI receipt scanning and unlimited feedback for 14 days.

tutorial.title: How HaresvaMi works
tutorial.subtitle: The process, without jargon.
tutorial.step3: You watch the results come in live.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.description: This is where you’ll see every rating your customers leave, dish by dish.

menu.title: Menu
menu.description: This is where you’ll manage your dishes and receipt abbreviations.

tablet.title: Tablet
tablet.description: This is where you’ll pair and monitor the in-restaurant tablet.

team.title: Team
team.description: This is where you’ll invite staff and assign their roles.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: This is where you’ll manage restaurant settings and your plan.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: This is where you’ll manage your personal details and access.

menu.title: Menu
menu.emptyDesc: Upload a photo of your menu and we will pull out the items automatically. You can also enter them manually.
menu.emptyLead: The AI needs to know what you sell so it can recognise dishes on receipts. Usually takes 2 minutes.
menu.aiCardTitle: Add with AI from a photo of your menu
menu.aiCardDesc: Upload a photo, PDF or Excel. The AI will pick out dishes, prices and categories. You just review.
menu.manualCardDesc: If you have few dishes or want full control — enter them row by row. Tab for next field, Enter for a new row.
menu.helpTitle1: It doesn't have to be perfect.
menu.helpBody1: You can always edit, add or remove dishes — and the AI will learn from your corrections.
menu.helpBody2: No need to type "Shopska = SH" now — we'll add those the first time a receipt comes in.
menu.helpBody3: Customers don't see the menu — they rate what they've already eaten. Just name, category, price.
menu.magicImportDesc: Use a menu photo or PDF. Then review and fix anything that needs it.
menu.manualDesc: Start with at least 5 items. That unlocks the next step.
menu.uploading: Reading menu... This might take a minute.
menu.reviewDesc: Review the items and fix mistakes. Names matter because we use them to recognize dishes from receipts.
menu.reviewProgress: Added: {count}. Add {remaining} more to continue to the tablet.
menu.reviewReady: Ready: {count} items. You can save the menu.
menu.reviewEmptyDesc: Add at least 5 items to continue setup.
menu.noMatchDesc: Try a different search or category.
menu.startOverConfirmDesc: All current items will be cleared from the review. Nothing is saved to your menu until you press Save.

errors.upload: Failed to read menu. Try a clearer photo.
errors.fileTooLarge: The file is too large. Upload an image or PDF up to 10 MB.
errors.emptyExtraction: We could not find menu items in this file. Try a clearer photo or enter them manually.
errors.invalidPrice: Price must be a number, for example 8.90.
errors.fixBeforeSave: Fix the highlighted fields before saving.
errors.needMoreItems: Add at least {count} items to continue.
errors.save: We could not save the menu. Please try again.
